adventure.title: 🗺️ Leo and Lily's Adventure
adventure.html:
Leo and Lily were two little mice who lived in a big forest. One day, they decided to go on an adventure.

They walked and walked until they saw a river. 'How do we cross it?' asked Lily. A friendly frog jumped out. 'I always swim across,' said the frog. 'But you are too small. Wait here.'

The frog came back with a big leaf. 'Use this as a boat!' Leo and Lily climbed on the leaf and floated across the river.

On the other side, they met a fierce cat. Leo was scared, but Lily was calm. 'Let's hide!' she whispered. They hid behind a prehistoric rock that was very, very old.

The cat walked away. 'That was close!' said Leo. They never forgot their big adventure.

describing.title: 🐾 Describing Animals
describing.html:
We can describe animals using special words. These words tell us what animals are like.

Some animals are strong. Elephants and bears are very strong. Some animals are gentle. Rabbits are very gentle. They are very soft too.

Some animals are fierce. Lions and tigers are fierce. They sometimes fight to protect their babies.

Some animals are smart. Dolphins are very smart. They can learn tricks. Some animals are patient. Crocodiles wait a long time for their food.

Eagles have feathers and wings to help them fly. They are very fast. How often do you see eagles? In some places, people usually see them in the mountains.
